name: Impossible Broccoli-Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim off large leaves of broccoli.
2. Remove tough ends of lower stalks and wash broccoli thoroughly; cut florets and stems into thin slices.
3. Combine broccoli, onion, and 1/4 cup water in a saucepan; cover and cook over medium heat for 6 to 8 minutes.
4. Drain thoroughly, pressing out moisture with paper towels.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients (4 eggs slightly beaten, 1 1/4 cups milk, hot sauce, salt, pepper, nutmeg, parsley, Swiss cheese, Parmesan cheese) in a bowl; stir in vegetables.
6. Pour mixture into a greased 10-inch pie plate and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes or until set. Let stand 10 minutes.
YIELD: One 10-inch pie.
